prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to the Clinical Impact Awards scheme run by the Advisory Committee on Clinical Impact Awards (ACCIA) for England and the Welsh Government. It does not apply to Scotland as it does not reference any governance or regulatory frameworks in place for Scotland's healthcare professionals.
